description: Open-source MoE coding model achieving GPT-4 Turbo-level performance. 338 languages, 160K context.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
DeepSeek-Coder-V2 is an open-source Mixture-of-Experts code language model that achieves performance comparable to GPT-4 Turbo in code-specific tasks. The 16B Lite version offers efficient inference with a 160K context window.

## Key Features
- **GPT-4 Turbo Comparable**: Competitive code performance with much larger models
- **338 Languages**: Extensive programming language support
- **160K Context**: Process entire repositories and documentation
- **MoE Architecture**: Efficient inference with expert routing
- **6T Training Tokens**: Extensive pre-training from high-quality corpus

## Specifications
- Parameters: 16B (MoE)
- Context Length: 160K tokens
- Default Size: 8.9GB (Q4_K_M)
- Supported Languages: 338 programming languages
- License: DeepSeek Model License
modelReadme: DeepSeek-Coder-V2 is an open-source Mixture-of-Experts code language model that achieves performance comparable to GPT4-Turbo in code-specific tasks. It was further pre-trained from DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Base using 6 trillion tokens sourced from high-quality, multi-source corpus materials. The model supports 338 programming languages and features a 160K context window.
name: deepseek-coder-v2-16b
title: DeepSeek Coder V2 16B
